game_name: Baldur's Gate II: Shadows of Amn

element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player defines class, abilities, alignment before world entry
Encounters escalate as player recruits up to 6-character party
NPCs provide bickering, romance, and side quests; interjections during player conversations
Powerful mage whose machinations structure entire narrative arc
Unlocks progression between Athkatla and surrounding regions
Areas revealed as explored; hidden when party leaves, creating persistent discovery mechanic
NPC-derived quests expand content from 50-60 hours core to 200-300 hours total

typical_relief_triggers: Pausing gameplay for tactical command issuance
typical_tension_triggers: World map transitions to dangerous regions
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Pausable real-time combat alternates tension and relief; narrative-driven pacing allows player-controlled rhythm balancing; side quests provide relief valleys between main story peaks

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Side quests via NPC dialogue; exploration of areas beyond main path
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Fog of war mechanic; areas hide when party departs, encouraging thorough exploration

difficulty_curve.early_game: Party formation and introduction to Athkatla environment; tutorial-like recruitment phase with Jon Irenicus as emerging threat
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalating party-based combat encounters; expanded world map access; side quest complexity increases
difficulty_curve.late_game: Full party synergy expected; Irenicus machinations intensify; set up for Throne of Bhaal expansion
notable_spikes: Transition from Athkatla to wider world map
Major story encounters tied to protagonist's unique heritage

notable_level_patterns.description: Athkatla serves as primary hub; player departs on quests via world map, returns for recruitment, dialogue, and story progression
Encounters flow in real-time but can be paused for command issuance; allows blend of action pacing and tactical strategy
Main story (50-60 hours) gates progression; side quests and exploration extend total play (200-300 hours) without blocking core narrative
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Story progression tied to Irenicus encounters and protagonist heritage

notable_level_patterns.description: Party composition and NPC interactions create dialogue branching and optional content; bickering and romance add emergent narrative texture
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Any dialogue sequence with recruited party members
